# Reproducer derived from https://github.com/pandas-dev/pandas/issues/17275
# repo: pandas-dev/pandas
# title: 'column' not in index, but hell it is. Seems like a bug...

# Last frames in traceback:
#   /Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.5/lib/python3.5/site-packages/pandas/core/frame.py line 1991 in __getitem__
#   /Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.5/lib/python3.5/site-packages/pandas/core/frame.py line 2035 in _getitem_array
#   /Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.5/lib/python3.5/site-packages/pandas/core/indexing.py line 1214 in _convert_to_indexer

# Minimal repro (conceptual):

def repro():
    # Conditions described in the issue:
    # I have a dataframe called delivery and when I print(delivery.columns) I get the following:
    # Index(['Complemento_endereço', 'cnpj', 'Data_fundação', 'Número',
    # 'Razão_social', 'CEP', 'situacao_cadastral', 'situacao_especial', 'Rua',
    # 'Nome_Fantasia', 'last_revenue_normalized', 'last_revenue_year',
    # 'Telefone', 'email', 'Capital_Social', 'Cidade', 'Estado',
    # 'Razão_social', 'name_bairro', 'Natureza_Jurídica', 'CNAE', '#CNAE',
    # 'CNAEs_secundários', 'Pessoas'
    raise KeyError('reproduce: see https://github.com/pandas-dev/pandas/issues/17275')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    repro()
